comments.body: Completed the Go-side BIG-GOM-301 parity coverage hardening slice. Changed: expanded intake connector tests to pin canonical source issue fields and Todo fallback behavior; expanded source-issue mapping tests to cover resolved-state normalization, metadata preservation, fallback IDs, trace IDs, and GitHub tooling selection; expanded workflow definition tests to round-trip validation evidence and approvals; updated the parity matrix to reflect the new Go test ownership. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/intake ./internal/workflow` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok. Commit SHA: `753017bdc0f6815f4f79d38c152d18959d0e2f6a`. PR URL: unavailable from this workspace because `origin` is a local mirror path and `gh pr view` cannot resolve a GitHub host; branch sync was verified by matching local/remote SHA `753017bdc0f6815f4f79d38c152d18959d0e2f6a`.

Closed BIG-GOM-301 after finishing the remaining Go workflow contract compatibility work. Changed: added Python-compatible `Flow*` aliases in `bigclaw-go/internal/workflow/model.go`, added default-value coverage for template and run JSON decoding, and refreshed `docs/go-domain-intake-parity-matrix.md` so the repo-native brief matches the canonical Go ownership. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/workflow` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok. Commit SHA: `e9a23718417d7cb44c1a2cd8dc3cb2b5598abe14`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`. Branch sync verified on both remotes before tracker closeout: `origin/symphony/BIG-GOM-301` and `github/symphony/BIG-GOM-301` matched `e9a23718417d7cb44c1a2cd8dc3cb2b5598abe14`.

issues.description: Finish consolidating the canonical Go task, intake, and workflow vocabulary so downstream runtime slices stop inventing parallel compatibility contracts.
issues.title: Unified domain model and intake contract migration

issues.description: Keep porting governance, execution-contract, audit, and policy semantics into Go so review and approval behavior no longer depends on Python-only code paths.
issues.title: Risk, policy, and approval semantics migration

issues.description: Close the Go execution loop with workflow-aware orchestration, journal state, and runtime closeout so active development no longer needs the Python workflow engine.
issues.title: Workflow orchestration and scheduler loop migration

issues.description: Move runtime evidence, reporting, and weekly operations closeout onto Go-owned observability outputs that line up with the new execution loop.
issues.title: Observability, reporting, and weekly operations surface migration

issues.description: Finish moving operator-facing status, control-center, and triage endpoints to Go once the workflow runtime and reporting surfaces are stable.
issues.title: Control center, triage, and operations view migration

issues.description: Port the remaining repo board, registry, gateway, linkage, and lineage surfaces into Go without leaking repo-specific concerns into the scheduler runtime.
issues.title: Repo collaboration and lineage surface migration

comments.body: Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by wiring an optional canonical GitHub remote through the Go bootstrap path. Changed: `bigclaw-go/internal/bootstrap/bootstrap.go` now configures a `github` remote when `github_url` is supplied while preserving `origin` as the push-default mirror remote; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now accepts `--github-url` for `workspace bootstrap`, `workspace cleanup`, and `workspace validate`; workflow/docs/launcher defaults now pass `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_GITHUB_URL` so fresh workspaces keep PR tooling available without manual remote surgery. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/bootstrap ./cmd/bigclawctl` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok. Commit SHA: `b2de09347a5d2141fa0333aa2f460305bc8d1ed3`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Kept the canonical refill metadata aligned with the live local tracker while BIG-GOM-307 remains active. Changed: `docs/parallel-refill-queue.json` now moves `BIG-GOM-301` into the completed batch and marks its status `Done`; `docs/parallel-refill-queue.md` now lists `BIG-GOM-302` and `BIG-GOM-307` as the active tranche and moves `BIG-GOM-301` into the recently completed section so unattended refill guidance matches `local-issues.json`. Validation: doc/state sync only; the previously green `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` run still covers the Go tooling surfaces on this branch. Commit SHA: `d4e1f947953683f58b419f332a490d1d2976c5f7`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by routing the remaining legacy ops entrypoints through the Go toolchain. Changed: `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl` now normalizes the legacy `workspace validate` flags (`--issues` list, `--report-file`, `--no-cleanup`) so existing callers keep working; `scripts/ops/bigclaw_github_sync.py`, `scripts/ops/bigclaw_refill_queue.py`, `scripts/ops/bigclaw_workspace_bootstrap.py`, `scripts/ops/symphony_workspace_bootstrap.py`, and `scripts/ops/symphony_workspace_validate.py` now preserve their historical paths while dispatching into `scripts/ops/bigclawctl`; the refill wrapper now defaults to `local-issues.json` when available so the local tracker remains the canonical backend. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `scripts/ops/bigclaw_github_sync.py status --json` -> ok; `scripts/ops/bigclaw_refill_queue.py --queue docs/parallel-refill-queue.json --local-issues local-issues.json` -> ok; `scripts/ops/symphony_workspace_validate.py --repo-url git@github.com:OpenAGIs/BigClaw.git --workspace-root /tmp/bigclawctl-validate-smoke --issues BIG-GOM-302 BIG-GOM-307 --report-file /tmp/bigclawctl-validate-smoke/report.json --no-cleanup --json` -> ok; `scripts/ops/bigclaw_workspace_bootstrap.py cleanup --workspace /tmp/bigclawctl-validate-smoke/BIG-GOM-302 --issue BIG-GOM-302 --repo-url git@github.com:OpenAGIs/BigClaw.git --cache-key github.com-openagis-bigclaw --json` -> ok. Commit SHA: `a0e9ccadc131cbc061b95c05f760395772259b56`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by teaching the Go workspace CLI to honor unattended bootstrap environment defaults directly. Changed: `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now loads `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_REPO_URL`, `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_GITHUB_URL`, `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_DEFAULT_BRANCH`, `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_ROOT`, `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_BASE`, and `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_KEY` as the default values for `workspace bootstrap|cleanup|validate`; added unit coverage for both env-backed defaults and fallback behavior in `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go`; refreshed `docs/go-mainline-cutover-issue-pack.md` so BIG-GOM-307 records the env-backed Go-first operator path. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_REPO_URL=git@github.com:OpenAGIs/BigClaw.git SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_GITHUB_URL=git@github.com:OpenAGIs/BigClaw.git SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_DEFAULT_BRANCH=main SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_BASE=$HOME/.cache/symphony/repos SYMPHONY_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_KEY=github.com-openagis-bigclaw scripts/ops/bigclawctl workspace validate --workspace-root /tmp/bigclawctl-env-validate --issues BIG-GOM-302,BIG-GOM-307 --report /tmp/bigclawctl-env-validate/report.json --cleanup=false --json` -> ok; `scripts/ops/bigclaw_workspace_bootstrap.py cleanup --workspace /tmp/bigclawctl-env-validate/BIG-GOM-302 --issue BIG-GOM-302 --json` -> expected safety error because branch `symphony/BIG-GOM-302` is already checked out in `/Users/jxrt/code/symphony-workspaces/BIG-GOM-302`. Commit SHA: `83315010d760b9c7a73bd864e2723a77e65a9816`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by teaching the Go GitHub sync path to verify all relevant remotes instead of only `origin`. Changed: `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now resolves the branch upstream plus `origin`/`github` remotes by default for `github-sync status|sync`, aggregates per-remote SHA evidence in JSON output, and adds regression coverage for upstream-ordered multi-remote sync; `bigclaw-go/internal/githubsync/sync.go` now exposes remote discovery and upstream-remote helpers used by the CLI. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl ./internal/githubsync` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> ok with `github`/`origin` both at `2de9a60119d01b9dc63ebd193d0a3fb7489428d6`; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync sync --allow-dirty --json` -> ok with `github`/`origin` both synced. Commit SHA: `2de9a60119d01b9dc63ebd193d0a3fb7489428d6`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by hardening the repo-native tracker update path against shell quoting issues. Changed: `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now supports `local-issue update --comment-file <path>` and `--comment-file -` for stdin so multiline validation evidence can be recorded exactly; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go` now covers file-backed and stdin-backed comment ingestion; `README.md` now documents the safer tracker comment flow for local issue operations. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl local-issue update --local-issues local-issues.json --issue BIG-GOM-307 --comment-file /tmp/big-gom-307-comment.md --json` -> ok. Commit SHA: `8ca805f08bef71304e675f61f9134748c457dfc4`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by making repo-native tracker updates timestamp-consistent. Changed: `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now captures one timestamp per `local-issue update` call so a combined state+comment update cannot drift across seconds; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go` now verifies that comment `created_at` matches issue `updated_at` when both are written in one command. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok. Commit SHA: `bac6611f4b3691377156fd8364b5bd8d30345443`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by adding a Go-native local tracker listing path for planning. Changed: `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store.go` now exposes filtered cloned issue listing for the repo-native tracker; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now supports `local-issue list` with optional `--states` filtering plus tabular or JSON output; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go` and `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store_test.go` now cover filtered listing, tracker-order preservation, clone safety, and default summary output; `README.md` now documents the Go-first tracker inspection command. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl ./internal/refill` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl local-issue list --local-issues local-issues.json --states "Todo,In Progress" --json` -> ok. Commit SHA: `687ec38272f4ab97cef146123fc88f3907cf7146`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by removing another Symphony CLI dependency from local tracker operations. Changed: `scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue` now routes `list`, `show`, and `state` directly through the Go-native `bigclawctl local-issue` path, supports `BIGCLAW_LOCAL_ISSUES_PATH` for repo-native tracker overrides, and only falls back to `symphony issue` for the remaining subcommands; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go` now executes the wrapper script against temp local issue stores to cover list fallback and state updates; `README.md` and `docs/parallel-refill-queue.md` now document that the wrapper works even when the standalone Symphony CLI is unavailable. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl -run 'TestBigclawIssueScript|TestRunLocalIssueList'` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `BIGCLAW_LOCAL_ISSUES_PATH=/tmp/... bash scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue state BIG-GOM-303 "In Progress" --json` -> ok. Commit SHA: `3fca8a5335522275e058f553f612371b3b121277`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by closing the repo-native local issue creation loop. Changed: `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store.go` now supports validated local issue creation with default `Backlog` state, deduplicated labels, and duplicate-ID protection; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main.go` now exposes `local-issue create`; `scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue` now routes `create` through the Go tracker path; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go`, `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store_test.go`, and `README.md` now cover and document the new repo-native creation flow. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl ./internal/refill` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue create --id big-gom-999 --identifier BIG-GOM-999 --title "Smoke local issue create" --labels "tooling" --priority 2 --json --local-issues /tmp/bigclaw-issue-create-smoke.json` -> ok. Commit SHA: `23fd82e4ebc7a12012ba85d94e45e8e4b3f00dac`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by making repo-native tracker comments available through the standard issue wrapper. Changed: `scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue` now supports `comment <issue> --comment|--comment-file ...` and routes it through the Go-native local tracker update path; `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go` now covers wrapper-based multiline comment recording; `README.md` and `docs/parallel-refill-queue.md` now document the high-level comment flow alongside the existing create/list/state wrapper commands. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl -run 'TestBigclawIssueScript|TestRunLocalIssue'` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `BIGCLAW_LOCAL_ISSUES_PATH=/tmp/... bash scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue comment BIG-GOM-307 --comment-file /tmp/comment.md --json` -> ok against a seeded temp tracker. Commit SHA: `bb99b9ea818b0c7fa8d4f7e7844a72725ff5c9ee`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

Progressed BIG-GOM-307 by removing duplicated local issue slug bookkeeping from create flows. Changed: `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store.go` now derives the repo-local issue `id` from `identifier` when callers omit `--id`, while still preserving explicit ids and duplicate detection; `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store_test.go` and `bigclaw-go/cmd/bigclawctl/main_test.go` now cover derived-id creation and identifier normalization; `README.md` now documents that `bigclawctl local-issue create` and `bigclaw-issue create` can be driven from the canonical issue identifier alone. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./cmd/bigclawctl ./internal/refill` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclaw-issue create --identifier BIG-GOM-310 --title "Derived id smoke" --labels tooling --priority 2 --json --local-issues /tmp/...` -> ok with derived id `big-gom-310`. Commit SHA: `9ed1b4e7662a45b9cb5cde94453dcb6dbe01491b`. PR URL: `https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/137`.

issues.description: Keep hardening the Go-first bootstrap, refill, and GitHub sync toolchain so unattended multi-issue work no longer relies on Python entrypoints or Linear-only operators.
issues.title: Workflow, bootstrap, and GitHub sync toolchain migration

issues.description: Freeze or retire the remaining Python runtime entrypoints only after the Go workflow, observability, and repo collaboration surfaces have matching owners and validation.
issues.title: Python deprecation and Go-only mainline switch
